title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Voylla Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Voylla Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Voylla Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Voylla Ventures Solutions:
Voylla Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
